body_txt: There is a lot of gambling in fiction and Real Life . The legal ones happens at The Casino and other licensed businesses. But where do the illegal ones happen? At an illegal gambling den. These dens can range from being otherwise indistinguishable from legitimate enterprises, to where people can bet on Deadly Games and Blood Sport . In that case it will likely heavily overlap with Fight Clubbing . Even the ones that look no different from legitimate businesses could actually be a way for the operators to get their victims Trapped by Gambling Debts and threaten financial ruin if they don't do dangerous or illegal things for them. Compare the Loan Shark and Mob Debt in this case. Often found in a Friendly Local Chinatown , and may overlap with a Bad Guy Bar or a Totally Not a Criminal Front . Also a common source of income for organized crime such as the Yakuza , The Mafia , and other Generic Ethnic Crime Gangs .
